valid.name: group-by-name
valid.code: SELECT category, count(*) FROM items GROUP BY category;

invalid.name: group-by-multiple-positions
invalid.code: SELECT region, category, sum(amount) FROM sales GROUP BY 1, 2;

errors.message: `GROUP BY <position>` silently breaks when the SELECT list changes. Use the column name or the expression itself.
`GROUP BY <position>` silently breaks when the SELECT list changes. Use the column name or the expression itself.

invalid.name: group-by-position
invalid.code: SELECT category, count(*) FROM items GROUP BY 1;

errors.message: `GROUP BY <position>` silently breaks when the SELECT list changes. Use the column name or the expression itself.
